tools.name: fetch_html
tools.description: Fetch a website and return its unmodified contents as HTML

url.description: URL of the website to fetch

headers.description: Optional headers to include in the request

max_length.description: Maximum number of characters to return (default: 5000)

start_index.description: Start content from this character index (default: 0)

tools.name: fetch_markdown
tools.description: Fetch a website and return its contents converted to Markdown

url.description: URL of the website to fetch

headers.description: Optional headers to include in the request

max_length.description: Maximum number of characters to return (default: 5000)

start_index.description: Start content from this character index (default: 0)

tools.name: fetch_txt
tools.description: Fetch a website, convert the content to plain text (no HTML)

url.description: URL of the website to fetch

headers.description: Optional headers to include in the request

max_length.description: Maximum number of characters to return (default: 5000)

start_index.description: Start content from this character index (default: 0)

tools.name: fetch_json
tools.description: Fetch a JSON file from a URL

url.description: URL of the JSON to fetch

headers.description: Optional headers to include in the request

max_length.description: Maximum number of characters to return (default: 5000)

start_index.description: Start content from this character index (default: 0)

tools.name: fetch_readable
tools.description: Fetch a website and return its main content parsed by Mozilla Readability, converted to Markdown. Strips away navigation, ads, and boilerplate. Ideal for articles and blog posts.

url.description: URL of the website to fetch

headers.description: Optional headers to include in the request

max_length.description: Maximum number of characters to return (default: 5000)

start_index.description: Start content from this character index (default: 0)

tools.name: fetch_youtube_transcript
tools.description: Fetch a YouTube video page and extract its captions/transcript

headers.description: Optional headers to include in the request

max_length.description: Maximum number of characters to return (default: 5000)

start_index.description: Start content from this character index (default: 0)

findings.title: MCP server exposes tools with completable arguments
findings.description: 6 tool(s) have schema properties that may support completion/complete enumeration.
findings.remediation: Review which argument values are exposed via completion/complete.

findings.title: Server accepts path traversal cursor without validation
findings.description: tools/list accepted cursor='../../../../etc/passwd' and returned a result instead of rejecting it. This may indicate missing cursor validation.
findings.remediation: Validate cursor values; reject non-opaque or path-like cursor strings.

findings.title: Server correctly ignores cancellation of unknown request
findings.description: The server remained responsive after receiving notifications/cancelled for a non-existent request.

findings.title: Race condition between request and cancellation causes server hang
findings.description: Sending a tools/list request immediately followed by notifications/cancelled with the same requestId caused the server to hang.
findings.remediation: Implement thread-safe request cancellation with proper state cleanup.
